tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: Media transport slips/creates a blouse/sticks at the guide plate (towards the winder)

abstract.p: Under certain environmental conditions (low temperature and low humidity), the printer experiences a static charge build-up on the guide plate, when using certain types of static sensitive media. This leads to inaccurate media transport over the guide plate. It can have impact on the print quality.

To prevent this from happening the material of the Melinex strip has been replaced with a better static conductive material to solve static related issues. The guide plate with the melinex strip is replaced with modification 39.

tsCauses.p: Melinex strip of the guide plate

li.p: Do How to remove the guide plate 19 How to remove the guide plate
Mark the modification in SDS en on the yellow sticker.
